content:
- Completed task 03 end-to-end after verifying blocker task 02 was done/passing.
- Performed skeptical plan review, amended plan with a prerequisite gate, and switched marker from TO BE VERIFIED to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented module skeletons for pginfo/dcs/process/ha/api/debug_api with typed state contracts and pub(crate) run/step_once worker functions.
- Added crate-local worker contract tests (type existence + callable step_once + snapshot contract construction).
- Resolved compile/clippy issues by removing unnecessary re-export fanout and using direct module paths in tests/imports.
- Ran required validation successfully: make check, make test, make test-bdd, make lint.
- Updated task file status/checklists to done/passing, ran task switch script, and added a new AGENTS.md learning about avoiding re-export fanout.
- Next: hand off to next task in queue; keep placeholder contracts stable and implement worker internals incrementally.

- Read prior progress and parsed .ralph/current_tasks.md.
- Applied chooser rules: unfinished tasks exist with <passes>false</passes>; must prioritize by priority tags and story chain rule. In story-rust-system-harness, ultra_high tasks exist and are not complete; next chain item after completed 01-03 is 07-task-ha-decide-pure-matrix-idempotency-tests (unblocked by 03 which is done).
- Wrote selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt and stopping immediately per instructions.

- Started by loading prior progress memory and reading `.ralph/current_task.txt`, which pointed to task 07 (`07-task-ha-decide-pure-matrix-idempotency-tests.md`).
- Inspected current HA module contracts (`src/ha/state.rs`, `src/ha/decide.rs`, `src/ha/actions.rs`, `src/ha/mod.rs`) and related references via parallel searches to ground a concrete execution plan.
- Wrote a detailed 10-step execution plan into task 07 and set the end marker to `TO BE VERIFIED` exactly as requested for this phase.
- Did not execute implementation or test commands yet; intentionally stopped after planning phase.
- Next step: perform deep skeptical verification pass, alter at least one plan item, then switch marker to `NOW EXECUTE`.
